text:
Once upon a time, in a small forest nestled between gentle hills, a curious young rabbit named Thumper had a dream. Every night, Thumper would leap out of bed, eager to dream about grand adventures through enchanted groves and mysterious castles adorned with twinkling fairy lights.

One moonlit night, Thumper dreamed he found a gate labeled ‘The Gate to the Enchanted Woods’ on the highest tree branch. With twinkling stars as his guide, Thumper navigated through woodland paths until he stumbled upon a clearing where ancient trees whispered tales of the past. In the heart of this magical glade stood a castle made entirely of moss. Thumper felt something alive within the stone walls—a sense of home that no place on earth could give.

He danced around the castle’s lawn, which glittered with small gems of light. Inside, enchanting creatures lived. A wise old owl perched on a branch, studying Thumper. A fleet-footed fox chuckled as it dod
